title: chenopodium luteorubrum
intro: Chenopodium luteorubrum, also known as goldenweed or yellowweed, is a flowering plant species in the family Chenopodiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Chenopodium luteorubrum include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Chenopodium luteorubrum can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
